title: satureja vulgaris subsp. calamintha
intro: Satureja vulgaris subsp. calamintha, also known as Calamintha, is a plant species belonging to the mint family, characterized by its fragrant leaves and small white or pink flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamintha include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Calamintha is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, boost the immune system, and support overall well-being.
